Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
199 
MDCD_ENRLMT_DAYS_YR 
LABEL: 
Medicaid Enrollment Days — Total in Year 
DESCRIPTION: Number of days of Medicaid enrollment in the calendar year, including traditional Medicaid and 
Medicaid Expansion Children’s Health Insurance Program (M-CHIP) enrolled days. 
SHORT NAME: MDCD_ENRLMT_DAYS_YR 
LONG NAME: MDCD_ENRLMT_DAYS_YR 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
3 
FILE(S):
